name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: NEVER Trump (petition enclosed)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd5e3/2a380d31/10f22966/fb4e78/3210080019/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd5e3/2a380d31/10f22966/fb4e78/3210080019/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd5e3/2a380d31/10f22966/fb4e79/3210080019/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://www.signforgood.com/rnc/?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trumpja_upsell?refcode=e20160709_trumpja_upsell")
I know it's hard to believe, but it's true --
The Republican Party will officially nominate Donald Trump for President in less than 2 weeks.
We're still in shock that someone so racist, sexist, and unfit could ever come this close to the Oval Office. **[We can't let him become our next President-- add your name to say that you'll NEVER vote for Donald Trump.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd5e3/2a380d31/10f22966/fb4e79/3210080019/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://www.signforgood.com/rnc/?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trumpja_upsell?refcode=e20160709_trumpja_upsell")**
Trump has run a dangerous campaign that has already undermined our national security. He would be such a disaster as Commander-in-Chief that scores of high-profile Republicans -- including members of the Reagan and Bush administrations -- have openly opposed him.
But Trump's latest fundraising numbers show that he's in this to win it, so we need each and every member of this grassroots community to stand up and condemn Trump's dangerous agenda along with every Washington Republican who supports him (like Kelly Ayotte). **[Add your name and pledge to NEVER support _or_ endorse Donald Trump.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd5e3/2a380d31/10f22966/fb4e79/3210080019/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://www.signforgood.com/rnc/?code=hassan&firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trumpja_upsell?refcode=e20160709_trumpja_upsell")**
-- Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd5e3/2a380d31/10f22966/fb4e7a/3210080019/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNzA5X1RydW1wSkEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160709_TrumpJA&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd5e3/2a380d31/10f22966/fb4e7b/3210080019/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Team Bullock
subject: enough is enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

There is a lot of noise out there. A Koch-backed group is sending 400,000 pieces of mail attacking Steve. Greg Gianforte has already put a half a million dollars of his personal fortune into his campaign and is up with a HUGE misleading TV ad buy.

All of this is designed to distort Steve's record. We're not going to let them.

⇒ Here is a key fact: under Steve's leadership, Montana is ranked as the most fiscally prudent state in the country. Watch Montanans explain why it matters.

| [](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=dz99tfuYHeb39zD2ueuBb69HynxA2tFx)
---

**[If you're already sick of all the big money being spent to distract from the real issues -- and trying to undermine everything Steve has done for our state -- add your name to say enough.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=1YYEHkejjoFz6uonfj%2Fx9q9HynxA2tFx)**

Thank you,

Team Bullock
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=jnHxAY1gMIkvbCULh5d0nq9HynxA2tFx)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=HS5%2F2WDu3gqTwCDUJy%2FlYa9HynxA2tFx).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Want to join me at the convention? This is your last chance.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
I want you to be there | Friend --

I’ll keep this short: Today is your last chance to enter to join me at the Democratic convention in Philadelphia. This team made history together, so it’s only right that you be there for this important moment.

And don’t worry about the flight or hotel -- the campaign will take care of all of that. I just want the chance to thank you in person.

**But if you don’t add your name before tonight at midnight, it’ll be too late. There are only a few hours left to enter:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary

|
**Chip in $1 to stand with Hillary -- and be automatically entered to meet her at the Democratic convention in Philadelphia:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

******No purchase, payment, contribution, signing up to receive text messages, or signing up to volunteer is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.**

Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 12:00 a.m. (all times Eastern) on 7/5/16 and 11:59 p.m. on 7/11/16. Enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to donate to Hillary for America, or enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to sign up to volunteer for Hillary for America, or enter by texting CONVENTION to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from Hillary for America. Msg&data; rates apply. Text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free, without contributing, volunteering, or signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive an invitation for winner and one (1) guest to attend the Democratic National Convention in Philadelphia where they will meet Hillary Clinton; round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Philadelphia area; and three (3) nights hotel accommodations (approx. value of Prizes: $2500). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201.
| | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.5 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU5NDY3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxMzk5NzA1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Sign Now: No more bad trade deals
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Friend: Pat Toomey just doesn’t get it.

Bad trade deals — like the Trans-Pacific Partnership (TPP) — that cater to China are devastating for our hardworking families here in Pennsylvania. They take away jobs, lower wages, and destroy livelihoods.

But, shockingly, Pat Toomey is STILL an enthusiastic supporter of the TPP. He’s voted for 7 free trade agreements — and pushed for even more as the President of the Wall Street-backed Club for Growth.

Pat Toomey should be protecting American workers — not sending their jobs overseas. Add your name now to demand that Toomey STOP supporting bad trade deals now.

www.katiemcginty.com/stop-bad-deals

This past week, I spoke with working families in Scranton — a city with a proud history of manufacturing quality American-made products. But Pat Toomey’s trade policies have left their mark on places like Scranton: today, thousands of good-paying jobs have been eliminated, factories are shuttered, and wages have stagnated.

Pat Toomey spent his career on Wall Street, living in Hong Kong working for a Chinese billionaire, and in Washington where he was the frontman for a leading Wall Street advocacy group. It’s no wonder he sides with special interests over American workers.

Sign your name now. Tell Toomey to stop supporting the bad trade deals that hurt American workers:

www.katiemcginty.com/stop-bad-deals

Thank you,

Katie McGinty

* A note on donations *

Katie is fighting for working families in PA — but we’re up against major special interest spending. We’re relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.
Chip in $5 or more today. Thank you.

Donate Now: https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20160710&refcode2=e20160710&amount=25

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/-9157413304967102464/6149408005453512704.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: Support Phil Today!
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive1.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4635c91746&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| Greetings,
---
| Great news for Phil and our campaign! An independent poll was released and it shows that Phil has a 45 point lead.
**_[Poll: Scott holds large lead for GOP](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=49a71fd947&e=19cebfe173)_**
**But in order to sustain this momentum --_and send a clear message that Vermonters want candidates who will run political campaigns that are an example for our children_ \-- **[**we need your help today! **](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=6f691617fb&e=19cebfe173)

**HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO: **
* **_VOTE_**! Early voting has started. You can [**request an absentee ballot**](mailto:https://mvp.sec.state.vt.us/), go to your town clerk's office now, or vote at the polls on August 9th. **PLEASE REMEMBER TO VOTE. WE NEED TO SEND A STRONG MESSAGE ABOUT THE TYPE OF CAMPAIGNS WE WANT IN VERMONT NOW AND IN THE FUTURE. **

* **_GET 5 MORE PEOPLE TO VOTE!_** We need you to make sure your friends and family vote too. The stronger Phil's finish in the primary, the more momentum he will have going into the general election.

* **TH****E JULY 15 TH CAMPAIGN FINANCE DEADLINE IS 5 DAYS AWAY. **[**Click here to donate to ensure Phil has the financial resources to win on August 9th and to take on the Democrats in November.**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3a4a6dfe7e&e=19cebfe173)

Our positive, issue-based campaign is gaining momentum every day. And it's clear a majority of Vermonters agree with us and know that Phil is the most experienced and most capable leader for our state.

Let's make this poll a reality, and get our friends and family to vote for Phil on AUGUST 9th!

Brittney Wilson
Phil Scott for Vermont

---
| [DONATE TODAY!](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=371c4fedf0&e=19cebfe173 "DONATE TODAY!")
---
| [JOIN THE TEAM!](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=58214a08d3&e=19cebfe173 "JOIN THE TEAM!")
---
| | | | | | [](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4c5fa4d632&e=19cebfe173)
---
| | [](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=0d98e927aa&e=19cebfe173)
---

---
| |
---
| Phil Scott for Governor, Glen Wright, Treasurer,
46 Three Mile Bridge Road, Middlesex, VT 05602

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173) or [unsubscribe from this list](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173&c=4635c91746)

******No purchase, payment, contribution, signing up to receive text messages, or signing up to volunteer is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.**

Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 12:00 a.m. (all times Eastern) on 7/5/16 and 11:59 p.m. on 7/11/16. Enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjU5NDY5NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxNDEwODM4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to donate to Hillary for America, or enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU5NDY5NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxNDEwODM4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to sign up to volunteer for Hillary for America, or enter by texting CONVENTION to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from Hillary for America. Msg&data; rates apply. Text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU5NDY5NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxNDEwODM4S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free, without contributing, volunteering, or signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive an invitation for winner and one (1) guest to attend the Democratic National Convention in Philadelphia where they will meet Hillary Clinton; round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Philadelphia area; and three (3) nights hotel accommodations (approx. value of Prizes: $2500). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU5NDY5NDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQxNDEwODM4S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201.
